calendar.matters:
Hearing On Plaintiff Tegsco, Llc'S (Dba San Francisco Auto Return) Motion To File Records Under Seal
Off Calendar May-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. JOHN I. KENEDDY, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3978 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING- THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF TEGSCO MOTION TO FILE RECORDS UNDER SEAL, ALTHOUGH C R C 2.551(B) (3)(A)(1) REQUIRES LODGING OF THE UNREDACTED RECORDS PRIOR TO A DETERMINATION ON A MOTION TO SEAL, GIVEN THE FACT THAT THE SUBJECT OF THIS CASE IS WHETHER THESE VERY DOCUMENTS SHOULD BE PRODUCED, THE COURT WILL GRANT PERMISSION TO FILE THE DOCUMENTS UNDER SEAL PENDING HEARING ON THE WRIT BECAUSE TO DO OTHERWISE WOULD MOOT THE WRIT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (DOCUMENTS TO BE FILED UNDER SEAL IS MENTIONED IN THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, PAGE 2-4 FILED ON MAY 2, 2007) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189=301/PJB
